prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 026
Filename: 026_shock.png
Purpose: Unexpected revelation. The mind has not caught up. Body freezes.
Success Criteria: Shock is visible but human and restrained, not cartoon surprise.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Chloe is suspended in the instant before understanding.
Review Focus: Reject if shock becomes exaggerated wide-mouth acting, comedy, horror, or identity drift.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical shock reference. Unexpected revelation captured before the mind catches up.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
